hero.tagline: I design and ship end-to-end software that stays reliable under high daily transaction load.
about_paragraphs: I work across backend services, Windows desktop applications, and on-site operations tooling, with strong ownership from planning to deployment.
My focus is practical engineering trade-offs: reliability first, clear workflows for operators, and fast incident recovery when infrastructure fails.
hero.current_line: Currently leading the AGF ferry ticketing and operations platform as the sole developer.

project.name: AGF Ticketing & Operations Platform
project.meta: Go, SQLite, REST APIs, LAN/Wi-Fi, Windows scripting, NanoPi
project.context: End-to-end ticketing and operations software for ferry stations handling high daily passenger volume.
project.role: Role: Sole developer from architecture to production operations
constraints: Intermittent network connectivity across stations required stable offline-first behavior.
Non-technical operators needed a simple flow with minimal setup overhead.
The system had to support sudden peak load without slowing boarding operations.
tradeoffs: Chose SQLite + disciplined sync strategy over distributed complexity to reduce operational risk.
Prioritized deterministic workflows and recoverability over feature-heavy UX.
Built custom desktop tooling for local reliability instead of purely web-based access.
architecture: TicketSeller app for station sales and on-site transaction handling
AGF Console for admin, reporting, and operations controls
Self-hosted services with backup/restore paths and watchdog monitoring

items.name: AI-assisted Business Dashboard
items.desc: Delivered analytics and CRM reporting prototypes, balancing speed, cost, and maintainability for stakeholder goals.

items.name: WordPress Service Platform
items.desc: Built and launched a WordPress website with custom PHP extensions and workflow-specific integrations.

items.name: Telegram Automation Campaign
items.desc: Implemented a bot campaign that reached around 1,500 participants in roughly two weeks.

items.role: Software Engineer (Sole Developer) - An Giang Ferry JSC
items.desc: Building and operating ticketing + operations systems for multi-station ferry services under high daily traffic.
Contributed to AI-assisted dashboards and took PM-style ownership in requirements, scope, and weekly delivery planning.
Delivered a production WordPress stack with custom automation and Telegram bot integration.

items.value: REST APIs, offline sync, service design
